name: GT-jb-unit-norm-one
source: HOS Handbook of Operator Algebras (joa-m) @ refs/hos/joa-m.md:2318 (§3.1.4). In a unital JB-algebra the identity 1 has norm 1; here it gives ||e_r||=1 for each central unit e_r of the ideal B_r. VERBATIM: "If A is unital we denote the identity by 1. Then it is clear from (i) that ||1|| = 1."
